title: 🎁 Referral Activity
summary: Invite your friends and earn bonuses
content:
📋 Activity Rules:

  1. The invited person must register through the staff member's referral link to be counted as a valid referral.
  2. You can get your referral link through the Telegram Bot, or contact the recruitment manager to learn how to obtain it.

🎁 Reward Details:

  • Invite a friend to join as Junior Staff → 200 ETB
  • Invite a friend to join as VIP 1 → 550 ETB
  • Invite a friend to join as VIP 2 → 1,750 ETB

📅 Activity Period: July 20 – July 26, 2026 (Ethiopian: Hamle 13 – Hamle 19, 2018 E.C.)

title: 🚀 Level Upgrade Subsidy Activity
summary: Upgrade to VIP level and receive additional subsidy
content:
📋 Activity Rules:

  1. When users upgrade from Junior Staff to VIP 1 or higher, the company provides an additional subsidy.
  2. After the level upgrade, the previous level's deposit will be fully refunded to the user.
  3. On the upgrade day, you can immediately start the new level's tasks and order work.

🎁 Reward Details:

  • Upgrade to VIP 1 or higher → Additional subsidy 550 ETB

📅 Activity Period: July 20 – July 26, 2026 (Ethiopian: Hamle 13 – Hamle 19, 2018 E.C.)

title: 💰 Team Fixed Salary & Tax Subsidy
summary: Earn a fixed salary based on the number of VIP members in your team
content:
📋 Activity Rules:

  • A fixed salary is paid once per month on the 1st (UTC).
  • After meeting the tax subsidy criteria, you can request a subsidy fund each successful financial cycle.
  • This benefit is permanent — the more members you have, the higher your salary payment.
  • Only VIP level members (VIP 1/2/3) in your team are counted.
